per_outcome.operationalization: Time in minutes from task start to submission, measured by the experimental platform
Base payment of $15 divided by task completion time in minutes
Total payment (base $15 plus potential $15 bonus for grades 5-7) divided by task completion time
Rubric score 0-7 assigned by expert peer graders with over five years of professional experience in the relevant field
Self-reported rating on 1-5 scale of participants' usage of the AI bot
Self-reported rating on 1-5 scale of the helpfulness of the AI bot
